title: fix(greenhouse): update Sprout description to be informative
author: murderszn
pr_body_excerpt: This PR updates the description for Sprout in both README.md and apps/GREENHOUSE.md. The previous description was a botched placeholder link to the social card image.

gist.headline: Sprouting proper words
gist.blurb: We fixed a botched placeholder in the Sprout app description. Now it actually tells you what it does instead of linking to an image!
gist.summary: Updated the Sprout app description in the README and Greenhouse docs to replace a broken image link placeholder with actual informative text.
gist.impact: Readers exploring the Greenhouse apps will now see a proper description for Sprout instead of a broken markdown link.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot fixing a wooden sign next to a small sprout plant, representing the corrected documentation.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, carefully painting words onto a wooden sign next to a small green sprout plant. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, carefully painting words onto a wooden sign next to a small green sprout plant. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
